title: Algerian Steak Wrap
description: A flavorful and aromatic Algerian-inspired dish featuring steak and herbs wrapped in a tasty wrap. This recipe combines the bold flavors of North Africa with the simplicity of a steak wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat your grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Season the sirloin with Algerian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
3. Grill the sirloin for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches a safe internal temperature of 63°C (145°F).
4. Meanwhile, grill the tips for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they reach a safe internal temperature of 63°C (145°F).
5. Warm the wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Slice the grilled sirloin and tips into thin strips.
7. Assemble the wraps by spreading a layer of chewy on the bottom, followed by a few slices of sirloin and tips.
8. Sprinkle a pinch of herbal spice blend on top for added flavor.
9. Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
